# model

**Instance Property**

The underlying model instance of the sound classifier stored in memory.

## Declaration

```swift
var model: MLModel { get set }
```

## Inspecting a sound classifier model

- **modelParameters**: The model configuration parameters the sound classifier used during its training session.
